We will be painting crosswalks like those pictured above at the corner of {{ LOCATION }} on {{ DATE }} at {{ TIME }}. Our goal is to protest for safer streets and a more effective government. Join us in community to demand a city that works!

What to expect

  • Short-term lane closures or detours around the intersection
  • Volunteers in hi-vis vests directing foot and vehicle traffic
  • Wet paint — please do not drive or walk over the crosswalk until dry
  • Estimated work duration: {{ DURATION }}
Not affiliated with LADOT or Bureau of Street Services (StreetsLA)

People’s Vision Zero
